text: i'm abbie lewis and i'm running to be leader of the federal ndp this world is not like this but we have to create it together it's not about me it's about us and it's about how we come together and build power together this campaign from day one has said we need to do away with the cult of leadership we need movement we need content we need unions we need the authority we need a common front that can source some fascism in our time and it's going to be a blast to get it let's get to work and the affordability of all the funds that they sourced and fashioned in the last year and it's easy to think that i lost you and i'm happy to be with you let's get to work whoo good morning winnipeg my name is savannah and i've been the campaign manager for this wild and beautiful operation that you've just caught a glimpse of the movement to make avi lewis the next leader of the ndp i said yes to this invitation because i needed a sliver of hope watching the world around us grow more hostile to everyday people i was really excited to organize an unapologetically values-driven campaign that puts people first because i believed that a world a better world was possible and now i know that it is everything we're doing is done with other people so i want to bring out some of the incredible organizers that have made this all possible this is our team and this is just some of a few of the people who have propelled this campaign across 30 communities in nine provinces and territories sold memberships in 338 out of the 343 ridings collected donations from over 10,000 people across the country and signed up over 8,400 volunteers from coast to coast to coast joining together to become the architects of our shared future our campaign has become a gathering place for people who are ready ready to get out and build the world we deserve ourselves and we are doing it in the way that it should be done we're doing it with art and music and laughter and celebration and friendship and with love it is my absolute honor to introduce three of the people who have helped us along the way we're so grateful to have with us this morning to nominate avi lewis the legendary mp of winnipeg center leah gazan our next mpp president nile ricardo and author activist and avi lewis super fan naomi klein please give it up for leah hello new democrats my name is leah gazan and i am the proud mp for winnipeg center or as you know what i like to call it the center of the universe we are the home of j.s woodsworth home of the general strike and welcome to the place where we are going to elect avi lewis as the next leader of the ndp his campaign has inspired thousands upon thousands of people to come to events donate their time and money and join our party i see a movement and it's because avi speaks truth to power and has offered up real solutions like a public option for food and groceries he understands that gender equality the right to access safe abortions and gender-affirming care are bread and butter issues he stands up for indigenous rights human rights and speaks out against genocide without apology or exception he is no liberal light he is a proud democratic socialist we faced diversity before and each time we picked ourselves up and we've come back stronger than ever this is not a city of quitters we are not a movement of quitters avi and i are not quitters we're fighters join us let's build a party for the 99% together that will take on the billionaires and win let's go let's go let's go let's go dear friends dear comrades i am speaking to you today with conviction because this party is mine it is ours chers amis chers camarades je vous parle aujourd'hui avec conviction parce que ce parti c'est chez moi c'est chez nous depuis que j'ai 18 ans j'ai vu des membres extraordinaires le seigneur de la terre qui continue de se battre avec solidarité et espoir mais le moment exige plus de nous face aux défis qui vivent les gens on a besoin de croire en notre force collective i saw extraordinary members the people of the earth who continue to fight with solidarity and hope but the moment demands more from us faced with the challenges that people are facing we need to believe in our collective strength because when we get together when we stand together when we are not afraid to be who we really are a proud party anchored in our values on the side of people there is nothing we cannot accomplish and that is what aviv proposes ambitious solutions yes but above all a capacity to gather to mobilize to lead us to believe again in what we can do together first of all it means that transformation will never come from a single party it will be born from a living convergence between street mobilizations trade struggles community movements indigenous resistance solidarity international networks and yes institutional spaces when they can be conquered it is this convergence that embodies louis from quebec it is deeply related to us we know that the real acquisitions are never the result of a donation but of a fierce struggle the quiet revolution the trade unions public education universal health care and feminist progress all of this is a struggle and not a consensus that's why we must unite with avi because this historic moment is not called for by caution it requires courage so let's be proud let's be proud and let's move forward together with avi everything becomes possible thank you thank you nile leah savannah thank you to everyone on this stage and in this room and watching across the country who have helped power this amazing campaign now many of you already know that i'm not just a super fan i happen to be married to abbey lewis and have been for 30 years so i can tell you a few things i can tell you with quite a bit of authority how kind he is how funny how generous i can tell you what an amazing father he is the way he just makes the perfect breakfast and lunch every morning for our son every time he's in town i can tell you that he is obsessed with the blue jays and has what is to me a completely inexplicable love for dungeons and dragons i knew that would kill i can also tell you that abhi is the most dedicated son to his parents stephen and michelle who i know are watching from toronto right now contrary to the opinion of a very long line of doctors stephen lewis was not going to miss this weekend for the world i know that it can seem strange to people who aren't that political but our lives are completely intertwined with politics with left ideas with social movements and there is no way i would rather live for 30 years avi and i have been having an never-ending conversation about how we win the thriving world that we need one that prioritizes art and friendship and kids and freedom and the health of the living world and how to beat the disaster capitalists who are standing in our way right now right now in canada the way we win that thriving beautiful world is we elect avi lewis the leader of the ndp my friends it's time to reweave the left in canada connect all of our issues to each other in a common story and into a common front we need to remind the hardworking people in this country that there are real alternatives to the far-right politics of hate and division and the so-called centrist policies of oligarchy and austerity applause as you've heard avi's campaign is about so much more than him it is an invitation to rebuild the ndp into a bold and exciting force from the bottom up for organizing in canada something that we desperately need if we're going to wrest this country back from the bankers and corporate overlords who have been dampening our dreams for far too long this campaign is about creating an ndp that belongs to each and every one of us a welcoming and sturdy party that will bring our movements together movements for indigenous sovereignty and labor rights and climate justice and racial and gender and disability justice together we are going to help each other dream big once again so today i am asking you to stand with me and thousands of others to dominate ovee and rebuild this party with radical and joyful energy one phone call one event one canvas and yes one donation at a time this has been one hell of a campaign relentlessly positive hardworking creative and so much fun we are at the finish line and now we are going to wake this country up together now it is my absolute pleasure to bring to the stage my partner in life and in troublemaking the next leader of the federal ndp avi lewis abid abid abid bonjour tout le monde merci naomi merci savannah leah nile et chaque membre de notre équipe tous les bénévoles donateurs et donatrices à notre campagne thank you naomi thank you savannah leah nile and every member of our team all the volunteers donors and donors to our country this has been a seven month marathon at the speed of a sprint and it has been the thrill of a lifetime to run it with all of you and now we're so close to the finish line and the start of a much bigger race to bring our party back from the wilderness and into the heart of canadian political life once again this campaign has played out against the backdrop of one of the bleakest times we have ever lived war and genocide economic attacks and threats of annexation and for all canadians the grinding everyday emergency of the cost of living out of control and yet our journey across this vast land has been punctuated with hope the daily victories of care and compassion the seeds of a brighter future planted by workers and neighbours in the soil of struggle here's a few memories that will stay with me the new flyer bus factory right here in winnipeg a unifor shop floor bursting with pride and camaraderie making electric and hybrid buses with canadian steel for use across the country the plant has 13 and a half billion dollars in back orders everyone shining with the promise of a clean transportation revolution waiting to happen the northern community land trust in whitehorse where local housing activists have built homes that young families with modest incomes can buy most of them under $300,000 homes that can never be flipped only sold for the original price plus inflation that's true non-market housing a 40-year veteran of the oil patch beside an abandoned well in edmonton we talked about how the disaster of these dangerous tapped-out wells could turn into a reclamation boom decades of good jobs for oil and gas workers in cleaning up these sites rather than drilling new ones all paid for with the swollen profits of oil companies if the law of polluter pays was actually enforced and that's what fires me up this country is filled with wise and caring people who are already hard at work building the solutions we need to all the crises we face and that includes all of you dedicated ndpers who have never abandoned hope despite all the predictions of our demise our campaign as you know has been powered by a set of simple principles that we believe are key to our collective comeback first we stay laser-focused on the cost of living crisis the everyday emergency of just getting by in an impossible economy we are the only party that criticizes capitalism so we're the only party that can tell canadians the truth about why everything is so expensive and you know what it is a handful of giant corporations dominate every sector of our economy these corporate cartels set prices control markets and benefit from the crisis of the cost of living so the system functions exactly as it was designed it concentrates wealth and power in the hands of a small elite second in the face of inequality at an all-time high we are done nibbling around the edges it's time to fight for solutions that are actually as big as the crises we face solutions that are popular practical and can inspire canadians in these incredibly hard times from head-to-toe health care to fare-free transit to tuition-free education we can fire up our base and build a bigger coalition we do it by fighting for the big wins that would truly change everyday people's lives it doesn't mean we can win them tomorrow but i'll tell you what it does do it brings in new organizers from communities already in the struggle it builds the energy excitement and ground game that we need to win third we're not shy about saying the loud part out loud we're not burying our politics in platitudes we're communicating with straight talk grounded in moral clarity quand israel commet un génocide à gaza nous appelons les choses par leur nom when the u.s and israel start an illegal and reprehensible war against iran that sets the world on fire we say canada should have absolutely no role in it whatsoever fourth canadians don't want a two-party system but we in the ndp need a political offer that cannot be confused with or co-opted by either the liberals or conservatives we're at a high-stakes moment in human history canadians know we are at a crossroads and we need a clear vision for how we get through this how we can protect canada from trump and all the chaos and toxic slop he generates how we can come out stronger more stable more secure because that's not where we're headed now under the carney government the path ahead is paved with unprecedented corporate welfare for the billionaire epstein class and more and more insecurity for the rest of us it is the voice on which the liberals and conservatives train us by adopting together in ottawa some really awful bill projects this agenda doubles down on the past exporting ever more raw resources it follows the lead of the us with more pipelines and ballooning military spending it embraces silicon valley's job-killing generative ai with no breaks or meaningful regulation this is a recipe for a future of continued chaos fossil fuels alone destabilize our world in many ways at once they attract explosive wars they drive inflation and pain at the pump and beyond and they accelerate climate breakdown but there is another path and it's our job as the ndp to light the way it's a safer path one that leads to a calmer less volatile future a path that makes common cause with countries around the world that are quickly moving away from the boom and bust roller coaster of oil and gas like the uk which just this week mandated solar panels and heat pumps in every new home build as a response to the oil price shock for canada it's a path on which we harness some of the vast wealth of our nation and use the tool of public ownership to put it to work directly solving the everyday crises we face that means building houses that families can afford with public developers hiring public construction companies tens of thousands of good unionized jobs retrofitting those homes manufacturing and installing those heat pumps to slash energy bills and emissions at the same time public options for groceries cell phones and pharmaceuticals ensuring that working-class canadians can buy essential goods and services with lower prices and higher wages in short it's a vision of the federal government using its power to go after some of the immense under-taxed wealth of this country and put it to use in directly making life easier and more secure for canadians it's a path to a canada where we're happier healthier safer and proud of our role on the international stage we know how to build power behind this vision because we're already doing it on this campaign we generate excitement with our bold ideas we turn that excitement into momentum through organizing we supercharge our organizing by trusting our base to lead at the riding level yes we build back our ground game well in advance of the next election and win more seats yes we fling open the doors to the 99% and become once again as my grandfather david lewis called it in the 1940s a political instrument of the people so friends for tommy and david and ed for audrey and alexa for jack and jagmeet for all the fighters who came before canada needs a strong ndp now more than ever let's get to work merci tout le monde thank you
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
